title: v0.1 implementation handoff
summary: Build the local-first MCP workstream server around SQLite, MCP tools/resources/prompts, CLI capture, Docker, and Markdown exports.

decisions.title: Use SQLite as the source of truth
decisions.summary: Markdown exports are generated views, not canonical storage.
decisions.rationale: SQLite keeps v0.1 local, simple, queryable, and portable.

next_actions.title: Run acceptance tests in a clean environment
next_actions.description: Verify stdio MCP, HTTP MCP, CLI capture, resources, exports, and secret rejection.

blockers.title: Client-specific MCP configuration still needs local validation
blockers.description: Claude Desktop and OpenClaw integration should be validated on the target host.
